title: Progressives to ponder their stay in Latvia's coalition
summary_full: Following the recent drone incidents in Latvian airspace, Defence Minister Andris Sprūds (Progressives) has resigned. His party plans to decide this week whether it will remain in the government's coalition, Latvian Television reported on May 10 evening.
